nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Claude Code agent-skill instructions for scaffolding a new Remotion project and composition, covering project setup via create-video, React Markup design guidance, interactivity best practices, optional TailwindCSS usage, and starting the Remotion Studio preview. External reference documentation, not part of versus-engine's own application source.
nodes.languageNotes: Structured as a Claude Code agent skill with frontmatter metadata and cross-links to sibling skill docs (tailwind.md, video-layout.md) and to other skills outside this directory (remotion-best-practices, remotion-markup, remotion-interactivity).

nodes.name: tailwind.md
nodes.summary: Short vendored agent-skill note on using TailwindCSS inside a Remotion project: allowed when Tailwind is already installed, but CSS transition/animate utility classes must be avoided in favor of driving animation from useCurrentFrame(). External reference documentation, not part of versus-engine's own application source.

nodes.name: video-layout.md
nodes.summary: Vendored agent-skill guidance on video-first layout, composition, and text sizing for Remotion scenes: designing around a single focal point, using flex/grid slots instead of manual absolute positioning to prevent overlap, minimum text sizes for 1080px-wide compositions, and a pre-render crowding checklist. External reference documentation, not part of versus-engine's own application source.
